title: Boons & Ultimatums
settingsToggleDescription: Turn the selected Ultimatums and Boons on or off for this game. This affects everyone in the game. Deckbuilding entries (such as Ultimatum of the Highlander or Induction) are enforced when decks are chosen and are not affected by this toggle.
deckbuildingBadge: Deckbuilding — not affected by the in-game On/Off toggle

deckErrors.highlander: Ultimatum of the Highlander: only 1 copy of {name} is allowed
deckErrors.induction: Ultimatum of Induction: decks can only include level 0 cards ({name})
deckErrors.exile: Ultimatum of Exile: cards with exile are Campaign Mode only ({name})
deckErrors.orthodoxy: Ultimatum of Orthodoxy: this deck must use a taboo list

BoonOfTheAncients.name: Boon of the Ancients
BoonOfTheAncients.text: Campaign Mode only. Each investigator begins the campaign with 5 additional experience.

BoonOfAthena.name: Boon of Athena
BoonOfAthena.text: The first time each game you draw the autofail token, you may cancel that token, return it to the chaos bag, and draw another in its place.

BoonOfDestiny.name: Boon of Destiny
BoonOfDestiny.text: Before drawing your opening hand, you may search your deck for 1 copy of a card and add it to your hand (this does not change the number of cards in your opening hand).

BoonOfHades.name: Boon of Hades
BoonOfHades.text: Each investigator begins the game with 2 additional resources in their resource pool.

BoonOfHermes.name: Boon of Hermes
BoonOfHermes.text: Each investigator may take an additional action during their turn, which may only be used to move.

BoonOfThoth.name: Boon of Thoth
BoonOfThoth.text: Each investigator begins the game with 1 additional card in their opening hand.

BoonOfOsiris.name: Boon of Osiris
BoonOfOsiris.text: The first time each investigator would be defeated in a scenario, after suffering trauma, heal all damage and horror from that investigator. That investigator cannot be damaged until the beginning of their next turn.

BoonOfTheMorrigan.name: Boon of the Morrígan
BoonOfTheMorrigan.text: When a player would add a random basic weakness to their deck during deckbuilding, they instead draw three random basic weaknesses, return one of their choice to the collection, and select one at random from the remaining two. The selected weakness is added to their deck.

BoonOfPersephone.name: Boon of Persephone
BoonOfPersephone.text: Campaign Mode only. If an investigator is defeated, they gain 3 additional experience.

BoonOfTheExplorer.name: Boon of the Explorer
BoonOfTheExplorer.text: Each investigator may take an additional action during their turn, which may only be used to Explore.

BoonOfTheChild.name: Boon of the Child
BoonOfTheChild.text: Once per round, an investigator may play the topmost event in their discard pile as if it were in their hand. If they do, after that event resolves, they must place it on the bottom of their deck.

UltimatumOfAgony.name: Ultimatum of Agony
UltimatumOfAgony.text: When assigning damage or horror, investigators must assign as much damage or horror as possible to a single card before any excess may be assigned to a different card.

UltimatumOfBrokenPromises.name: Ultimatum of Broken Promises
UltimatumOfBrokenPromises.text: Remove the Elder Sign token from the chaos bag during setup of a campaign or standalone scenario.

UltimatumOfTheBrokenVeil.name: Ultimatum of the Broken Veil
UltimatumOfTheBrokenVeil.text: Anytime 1 or more weakness cards are discarded from the top of an investigator's deck, shuffle those cards back into that investigator's deck.

UltimatumOfChaos.name: Ultimatum of Chaos
UltimatumOfChaos.text: Each investigator's starting deck of non-signature, non-weakness cards must be selected at random from among all eligible options in that player's collection. (Honor rule — not enforced by the app.)

UltimatumOfDisaster.name: Ultimatum of Disaster
UltimatumOfDisaster.text: Each investigator's deckbuilding requirements gain "1 additional random basic weakness."

UltimatumOfDread.name: Ultimatum of Dread
UltimatumOfDread.text: Do not skip the mythos phase during the first round of each game.

UltimatumOfFailure.name: Ultimatum of Failure
UltimatumOfFailure.text: Add an additional autofail token to the chaos bag during setup of a campaign (or standalone scenario).

UltimatumOfFinality.name: Ultimatum of Finality
UltimatumOfFinality.text: Campaign Mode only. If an investigator is defeated by damage, they are killed. If an investigator is defeated by horror, they are driven insane.

UltimatumOfForbiddenKnowledge.name: Ultimatum of Forbidden Knowledge
UltimatumOfForbiddenKnowledge.text: Each investigator begins the game with 1 fewer card in their opening hand.

UltimatumOfHardship.name: Ultimatum of Hardship
UltimatumOfHardship.text: Each investigator begins the game with 2 fewer resources in their resource pool.

UltimatumOfTheHighlander.name: Ultimatum of the Highlander
UltimatumOfTheHighlander.text: Each investigator's deck can only include 1 copy of each non-weakness card, by title (unless multiple copies of that card are required by that investigator's deckbuilding requirements).

UltimatumOfInduction.name: Ultimatum of Induction
UltimatumOfInduction.text: Campaign Mode only. Investigator decks can only contain level 0 cards. Investigators cannot earn or spend experience.

UltimatumOfOrthodoxy.name: Ultimatum of Orthodoxy
UltimatumOfOrthodoxy.text: Play the game using the Taboo List.

UltimatumOfTheScream.name: Ultimatum of The Scream
UltimatumOfTheScream.text: Campaign Mode only. When a unique non-story and non-weakness ally asset you control is defeated, remove it from the game. You cannot play that card for the rest of the campaign. After the scenario ends, remove that ally and all copies of it from each player's deck.

UltimatumOfSurvival.name: Ultimatum of Survival
UltimatumOfSurvival.text: Campaign Mode only. If an investigator is killed or driven insane, their player is eliminated from the campaign and cannot continue playing as a new investigator.

UltimatumOfUltimatums.name: Ultimatum of Ultimatums
UltimatumOfUltimatums.text: Campaign Mode only. Before each game in the campaign, choose 1 ultimatum/boon at random and begin the game with that boon or ultimatum active. (This does not apply to ultimatums or boons that affect deckbuilding or chaos bag construction.)

UltimatumOfExile.name: Ultimatum of Exile
UltimatumOfExile.text: Treat each card with "exile" in its text box as if it also had "Campaign Mode only."

UltimatumOfTheSpiral.name: Ultimatum of the Spiral
UltimatumOfTheSpiral.text: Campaign Mode only. After an investigator is defeated, add 1 random basic weakness to their deck.

UltimatumOfMalevolence.name: Ultimatum of Malevolence
UltimatumOfMalevolence.text: Easy or Standard difficulty only. While playing, use the "Hard/Expert" side of the scenario's reference card.

morrigan.instructions: Choose 1 of these 3 random basic weaknesses to return to the collection. One of the remaining 2 will be chosen at random and added to your deck.
morrigan.waiting: Waiting for {investigator} to choose a weakness to return…

deckRequirements.chaos: Ultimatum of Chaos: your deck's non-signature, non-weakness cards must be chosen at random from your collection (honor rule — not enforced by the app)
deckRequirements.disaster: Ultimatum of Disaster: your deck gains 1 additional random basic weakness (added automatically)
deckRequirements.highlander: Ultimatum of the Highlander: only 1 copy of each non-weakness card by title (unless your investigator requires more)
deckRequirements.induction: Ultimatum of Induction: only level 0 cards; no experience can be earned or spent
deckRequirements.orthodoxy: Ultimatum of Orthodoxy: your deck must use a taboo list
deckRequirements.exile: Ultimatum of Exile: cards with exile cannot be used in standalone play
